app_release_notes: v0.16.48 - Two-device license activation. Your access code now activates on up to two of your computers - say your bench PC and your range laptop. Once a computer is activated it keeps running offline, same as always. Moving to a new machine? Email support@loadscope.app and we'll free up a slot.

Once a computer is activated it keeps running offline, same as always. Moving to a new machine? Email support@loadscope.app and we'll free up a slot.
